playbookOutput.executionSummary: Step 1: No refusal, emergency, or out-of-scope triggers matched. Step 2: Route A matched. Step 3: Passed the Analysis Agent draft to Checker Agent with originating_agent set to Analysis_Agent. Checker evaluated all five rules including Rule 2 (internal citation required for document audits). Checker returned PASS. Step 4: Formatted into 5-part response structure. Applied response controls: cite_sources, no_legal_advice, no_policy_invention, include_practical_next_step. VERIFICATION ANCHOR includes both external legal citations from the regulatory datastore and internal citations from the uploaded document.
